chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 651 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of Bail Application. Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate along with applicants. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. Date of Hearing & Order: 30-10-2023 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.- This FIR has been registered by ASI Ashique Ali Leghari of P.S, Daharki district Ghotki. He has alleged that on 11.09.2023, applicants and co-accused on account of previous enmity quarreled with each other at G.T Road Daharki outside the gate of the Court, and caused injuries to each other with bricks, stones and lathies. Some of accused were armed with pistols who pointed the same to other side and issued them threats. 2. Learned counsel for the applicants submits that co-accused Munwar Ali, Imdad Ali, Muhammad Hassan, Muhammad Hussain and Gulsher have been granted post-arrest bail by learned trial Court and the case of present applicants is on identical footings, hence rule of consistency is applicable. His arguments have not been opposed by learned Additional P.G. Complainant is present and submits that Challan has been submitted in the Court and the applicants are no more required for further investigation. 3. Accordingly, in view of the above facts and grounds, this bail application is allowed and the interim pre-arrest bail earlier granted to the applicants by this Court is hereby confirmed on the same terms and 2 conditions. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits.

Accordingly, in view of the above facts and grounds, this bail application is allowed and the interim pre-arrest bail earlier granted to the applicants by this Court is hereby confirmed on the same terms and 2 conditions. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Ahmad
